exploration_notes: Fixed race condition in session key rotation (cycle_key/acycle_key) in base.py. The old code delegated to create() which could silently lose session data on key collision. The new code: (1) copies session data upfront to protect against mutation, (2) owns the retry loop directly — generating a new key, restoring session data into _session_cache, and calling save(must_create=True) which atomically fails with CreateError on collision, (3) retries with a fresh key on collision instead of losing dat
